arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ المَطْبَخُ العَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِ الأَطْبَاقِ وَاللَّذَاذَةِ. يُعَدُّ الكُسْكُسِيُّ وَالمَنْسَفُ مِنْ أَشْهَرِ المَأْكُولَاتِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ. تَسْتَخْدِمُ العَائِلَاتُ التَّوَابِلَ العَطِرَةَ لِإِعْطَاءِ الطَّعَامِ نَكْهَةً خَاصَّةً. يَجْتَمِعُ الأَهْلُ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ الغَدَاءِ. يُعَبِّرُ الطَّعَامُ عَنِ الهُوِيَّةِ وَالتُّرَاثِ فِي كُلِّ بَلَدٍ.
translation: Arapska kuhinja se odlikuje raznolikošću jela i ukusnošću. Kuskus i mansaf se ubrajaju u najpoznatija narodna jela. Porodice koriste mirisne začine kako bi hrani dale poseban ukus. Članovi porodice se okupljaju oko jedne trpeze radi ručka. Hrana izražava identitet i naslijeđe u svakoj zemlji.
translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by a variety of dishes and deliciousness. Couscous and Mansaf are among the most famous traditional foods. Families use aromatic spices to give the food a special flavor. Family members gather around one table to have lunch. Food expresses the identity and heritage of every country.
